payload.name: Fix tests and reorganize
payload.description: Complete the InsuranceClaimSystem backend by: 1) Replacing 5 root-level service files with sub-folder versions (Auth/, Encryption/, Email/, Payment/, Storage/), 2) Updating interfaces (IEmailService, IStripeService, IPiiEncryptionService, IFileStorageService), 3) Fixing the 5 failing tests (ClaimValidationServiceTests in-memory DB issue + ClaimLifecycleIntegrationTest), 4) Final build and test run to get 0 errors and all 51 tests passing
